name: EvidenceRecordObservationAndLink
description: Privacy-conscious provider-neutral evidence identity, normalized observations, source authority role, and append-only links to Canonical Transaction.
schema_def: evidence_record: id ULID; kind agent_capture|statement_row|receipt|external_document|owner_assertion; logicalIdentityDigest unique; optional opaqueExternalReference; optional contentFingerprint; actor; trusted time. evidence_observation: evidenceId; optional accountId, signedAmountMinor, currencyCode, transactionDate, postingDate, instrumentId, cardholderId, descriptionFingerprint; no arbitrary metadata or raw payload. evidence_link_event: id, evidenceId, transactionId, role supporting|confirming|historical_support, action link|revoke|replace, optional decisionId, reason, actor, time. Approved statement_row evidence is authoritative for current canonical financial facts only through a reconciliation decision; agent_capture remains provisional until reconciled. Active confirming statement evidence targets at most one active transaction. A statement correction keeps the prior agent link and superseded fact queryable and records the replacement chain; nothing is overwritten.
